per_response.subject: Question about charge for order #NV23456
per_response.body: Hi, I recently received my order #NV23456 for the X500 Wireless Headphones, but when I looked at my bank statement, I noticed I was charged $129.99, which is $10 more than the price listed on your website. The order was placed on February 10th and I received an email confirmation with the total of $119.99. Could you please look into this and let me know what happened? My order details are as follows: 1 X500 Wireless Headphones, color: black, and the payment method was PayPal.

After investigating, we found that there was an error in our system that added a $10 shipping surcharge to your order, which was not reflected in your initial order confirmation. The correct total for your order, including the shipping surcharge, is indeed $129.99. However, since this was not clearly communicated to you, we would like to refund the $10 shipping surcharge back to your PayPal account as a one-time courtesy. You should receive the refund within the next 3-5 business days. If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact us.
